assertions.text: domain-no-imports: domain/shipment.ts has no framework imports
assertions.evidence: No express/prisma/nestjs/redis/kafka imports in domain file

assertions.text: ports-are-abstract-classes: all ports use abstract class
assertions.evidence: All 5 port files export abstract classes — including IGRPCPort for inbound

assertions.text: use-cases-wrap-telemetry-span: all 5 use cases use telemetry.span()
assertions.evidence: 5/5 use case files wrap execute() in this.telemetry.span(...)
DynamoDB adapter uses @aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb GetCommand/PutCommand/UpdateCommand/DeleteCommand — no Prisma or Mongoose
SQS adapter uses @aws-sdk/client-sqs SendMessageCommand — no kafkajs
shipment-handler.ts uses @grpc/grpc-js with buildServiceImpl() — no Express or NestJS
MemoryShipmentCache uses Map<string, {value, expiresAt}> with lazy TTL expiry — no ioredis

assertions.text: status-as-const: ShipmentStatus defined as const object
assertions.evidence: as const pattern found in domain/shipment.ts
All three transition methods found in domain entity
